title: 批处理作业，Batch批量计算-容器服务 Kubernetes 版 ACK(ACK)-阿里云帮助中心
heading_path: The following workflow executes a diamond workflow apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1 kind: Workflow metadata: generateName: dag-diamond- spec: entrypoint: diamond templates: - name: diamond dag: tasks: - name: A template: echo arguments: parameters: [{name: message, value: A}] - name: B depends: "A" template: echo arguments: parameters: [{name: message, value: B}] - name: C depends: "A" template: echo arguments: parameters: [{name: message, value: C}] - name: D depends: "B && C" template: echo arguments: parameters: [{name: message, value: D}] - name: echo inputs: parameters: - name: message container: image: mirrors-ssl.aliyuncs.com/alpine:3.7 command: [echo, "{{inputs.parameters.message}}"] > 相关参考 > 产品和定价
